dept_hyd_corporation_fullform: Hyderabad Municipal Corporations (GHMC, CMC, MMC, SCB)
dept_hyd_corporation_desc: Hyderabad's urban area is administered by three municipal corporations and one cantonment board, formed in 2026 under the CURE (Core Urban Region of Excellence) framework. GHMC covers central Hyderabad across 6 zones; Cyberabad Municipal Corporation (CMC) covers the western IT corridor across 3 zones; Malkajgiri Municipal Corporation (MMC) covers the eastern and northern areas across 3 zones; and the Secunderabad Cantonment Board (SCB) governs the cantonment area.
dept_hyd_zone_desc: Administrative zones within each municipal corporation, each managed by a Zonal Commissioner. Zones coordinate civic services and infrastructure projects across a cluster of circles and wards.
dept_hyd_circle_desc: Administrative circles within each zone, the intermediate tier between zones and wards for day-to-day civic management.
dept_hyd_ward_desc: Individual wards, the basic unit of local representation with elected corporators. There are 300 wards across the three municipal corporations.
dept_hmda_desc: HMDA (Hyderabad Metropolitan Development Authority) is the statutory planning and development authority for the Hyderabad Metropolitan Region, covering 7,257 km² across parts of Hyderabad, Medchal, Rangareddy, Bhuvanagiri, Sangareddy, Medak and Siddipet districts. It is responsible for master planning, infrastructure development, and land-use regulation across the wider metropolitan area beyond the three municipal corporations.
dept_police_commissionerate_desc: Hyderabad Metropolitan Region has three police commissionerates: Hyderabad City Police, Cyberabad Police, and Malkajgiri Police.
dept_police_city_desc: Police station jurisdictions across Hyderabad, Cyberabad, and Malkajgiri commissionerates.
dept_police_traffic_desc: Hyderabad Traffic Police jurisdictions for traffic management.
dept_election_pc_desc: Parliamentary constituencies electing Members of Parliament to the Lok Sabha.
dept_election_ac_desc: Assembly constituencies electing Members of Legislative Assembly to the Telangana Legislative Assembly.
dept_admin_district_desc: Revenue districts headed by District Collectors for general administration.
dept_admin_mandal_desc: Mandals headed by Mandal Revenue Officers for local revenue administration and land records.
dept_pincode_desc: Postal PIN code areas served by India Post offices.
dept_ghmc_zone_old_desc: GHMC (Greater Hyderabad Municipal Corporation) operated as a unified civic body from 2007 to 2026. It was divided into 6 zones — Central (Khairatabad), West (Serilingampally), South (Charminar), North (Kukatpally), North East (Secunderabad), and East (L.B. Nagar) — each managed by a Zonal Commissioner.
dept_ghmc_circle_old_desc: Administrative circles used within the GHMC zone structure between 2007 and 2025.
dept_ghmc_ward_old_desc: Ward boundaries used between 2007 and 2025 under the unified GHMC, comprising 150 wards. GHMC was reorganised and split into GHMC, CMC and MMC in 2026.
